View mode
Hey, I'm Mohan. Been doing AI/ML engineering for 4.5+ years now, mostly agentic AI, RAG, and production ML across insurance, healthcare, and finance. Everything on this site is real work I've shipped, not side projects, and the numbers are right there next to it. Poke around, or just ask my assistant if you want the quick rundown.
Okay, here's the real stuff. Multi-agent setups with LangChain and LangGraph, RAG on FAISS, FastAPI serving it all up, drift monitoring, CI/CD through Terraform, running live in production, not sitting in some notebook. I got into the why behind each build, not just what it did. Have a look, or ask my assistant if you're curious why I made a specific call somewhere.

Ask why I built it this way

Decision-making, not just tool names.

LangGraph matters when the workflow is more than one prompt. It lets the system plan, retrieve, route, validate, retry, and keep state across an agentic workflow.
Failure Mode Thinking

What I check before shipping AI systems.

Retrieval Miss

Wrong or weak context can produce confident but useless answers, so retrieval quality and evals matter.

Hallucination

Outputs need grounding, guardrails, and fallback behavior when evidence is missing.

Latency Spike

Serving needs batching, caching, routing, and FastAPI-level performance thinking.

Model Drift

Production systems need thresholds, monitoring, alerts, and rollback paths.

Human Review

High-risk workflows need escalation and human-in-the-loop validation, not blind automation.

Flagship Systems

Production systems with measurable impact.

Two flagship systems built from real production experience: an agentic knowledge assistant and production clinical/fraud ML intelligence workflows.

Architecture

A closer look at how the core AI systems are wired, shipped, monitored, and improved.

This portfolio emphasizes the systems built and improved in production: agentic assistants, clinical NLP, fraud detection, RAG, evaluation, model monitoring, and automated deployment.

Interface Layer

Portfolio interface, recruiter Q&A, assistant responses, and project case studies.

Agent Runtime

LangChain/LangGraph orchestration, agent persona checks, factual grounding, and FastAPI inference.

Knowledge Layer

FAISS-backed RAG, EHR/document retrieval, Neo4j/Cypher entity resolution, and graph context.

MLOps Layer

MLflow, Kubeflow, Terraform, Docker/Kubernetes, retraining workflows, and release automation.

Observability

Prometheus, Grafana, drift threshold monitoring, proactive retraining triggers, and latency tracking.

Core Stack

Technical stack I use to ship AI systems.

Tools I use across agentic AI, RAG, clinical NLP, fraud detection, MLOps, cloud deployment, data pipelines, and production monitoring.

Resume Snapshot

Experience built around production AI.

Professional background across insurance, healthcare, financial services, and enterprise operational analytics.

AI/ML Engineer · W. R. Berkley Corporation

Architected a LangChain/LangGraph agentic knowledge assistant with RAG over FAISS, reducing analyst resolution time by 60%; engineered FastAPI inference, improved latency by 42%, sustained 99.9% uptime, and automated Terraform/Docker/Kubernetes releases under 48 hours.

Nov 2025 — Present

AI/ML Engineer · Hartford HealthCare

Developed clinical NLP over unstructured EHR notes with 91% AUC across 1M+ patient records; deployed sub-100ms PyTorch inference, clinical RAG with 89% retrieval accuracy across 200K+ docs/month, and TTS/STT intake workflows.

Jan 2025 — Oct 2025

Machine Learning Engineer · Northern Trust

Built fraud detection on 50M+ transaction records reaching 94% precision; designed MLflow/Kubeflow retraining, processed 10TB+ daily data, and implemented Neo4j/Cypher entity resolution to uncover fraud rings.

Nov 2022 — Jul 2024

Machine Learning Engineer · Hitachi Energy

Built time-series forecasting and anomaly detection for energy assets, achieving 96% forecast accuracy, reducing unplanned downtime by 18%, improving asset utilization by 12%, and deploying containerized ML pipelines on AWS SageMaker.

Jun 2021 — Oct 2022
